name: trading-platform-root
description: Root management for the Trading Platform microservices

scripts.infra:up: docker compose --env-file .env -f infra/compose/base.yml up -d redis timescaledb
scripts.infra:down: docker compose --env-file .env -f infra/compose/base.yml stop redis timescaledb
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @trading-platform/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @trading-platform/config build && pnpm --filter @trading-platform/logger build
scripts.db:seed: pnpm --filter @trading-platform/persistence run build && pnpm --filter @trading-platform/persistence run db:seed
scripts.dev: pnpm run infra:up && pnpm run infra:wait && pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run db:seed && concurrently --kill-others --handle-input --names shared-types,config,logger,engine,persistence,api,ws-gateway,market-maker,frontend "pnpm run dev:shared-types" "pnpm run dev:config" "pnpm run dev:logger" "pnpm run dev:engine" "pnpm run dev:persistence" "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:ws-gateway" "pnpm run dev:market-maker" "pnpm run dev:frontend"
scripts.compose:backend:up: docker compose --env-file .env -f infra/compose/base.yml -f infra/compose/prod.yml --profile backend up -d --build
scripts.compose:full:up: docker compose --env-file .env -f infra/compose/base.yml -f infra/compose/prod.yml --profile backend --profile frontend up -d --build
